title: PJM Transfer Interface Information 5 Min JSON API
description:
Actual MW flow and transfer limits for PJM’s Transfer Interfaces. This data
is reported on a five-minute basis. These interfaces are internal to PJM.
Each interface is comprised of a set of transmission lines defined in
*PJM Manual 03: Transmission Operations*.

⚠️ PJM does not typically backfill this data series in the event of data drops.
